use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use azurehound because BloodHound data collector for Microsoft Azure (program).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use azurehound as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `azurehound [options] [args]` as documented upstream for azurehound.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair azurehound with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `azurehound --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
